{{Infobox concept
| name = Creeping Shadow
| introduced = ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn
}}

''See also: [[Creeping Shadow Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Urg'naut, known as the Creeping [[Shadow]], is a [[Great Elder]] characterized by an intense hatred for [[life]]. This entity operates primarily through shadows and the creation of [[Elderspawn]], such as the Shade, which acts as a parasite by feeding on human vengeance and bloodlust. While the Creeping [[Shadow]] can influence the world through dreams or by inducing despair, its presence is often marked by a massive, serpent-like darkness that can obscure light and create voids in the physical world. When an individual is taken by a Creeping [[Shadow]], they do not merely die but effectively cease to exist. The entity is powerful enough to instill fear in the [[Sleepless]] and possesses a presence that can be contained only by extensive networks of light and reflective objects. Urg'naut is described as a being of immense scale, capable of manifesting as a seething mass of darkness that can threaten entire capitals.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Creeping Shadow]] is a hungry entity.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c6">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Creeping Shadow]] is free.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c20">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Using the [[Optasia]] device now would mean staring straight into the [[Creeping Shadow]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Creeping Shadow]] is associated with darkness, the [[void]], existence as suffering, and death as mercy.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Creeping Shadow]] created an empty space in the ocean.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Sleepless]] fear the [[Creeping Shadow]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Creeping Shadow]] faced the [[Outsider]] in the [[void]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Creeping Shadow]] is a being that [[Kelarac]] might be on the same level as.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
